title: BetterInvisibility
description: Improves Invisibility Effect by Allowing to Hide Armors/Items
body:
## BetterInvisibility

**More info & guide:** [GitHub – BetterInvisibility](https://github.com/NewAmazingPVP/BetterInvisibility)

**Latest builds (features + bug fixes)**: [GitHub Actions – BetterInvisibility](https://github.com/NewAmazingPVP/BetterInvisibility/actions)

**What it does**
Makes invisibility truly invisible by hiding armor, held items, and potion particles from other players (packet-level). No client mods.

**Works on**: Spigot/Paper/Purpur/Folia

**How to use**

1. Drop the jar in `plugins/` and restart.
2. Optionally tweak what gets hidden in `config.yml`.

**Config (YAML)**

```yaml
hide:
  helmet: true
  chestplate: true
  leggings: true
  boots: true
  mainhand: true
  offhand: true
  potionParticles: false
```

**Support**  
GitHub Issues: https://github.com/NewAmazingPVP/BetterInvisibility/issues  
Discord: https://discord.gg/u3u45vaV6G
